title: oplismenus crus-galli var. hispidus
intro: Oplismenus crus-galli var. hispidus, also known as rough false-bamboo or hispid false-bamboo, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Oplismenus crus-galli var. hispidus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive problems, and relieving stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
